stories.text: As an application developer, I want to create a typed channel with a single function call so that I can start publishing and subscribing without configuring infrastructure.
As an application developer, I want schema validation at publish time so that subscribers never receive messages that do not match the channel's contract.
As an application developer, I want to subscribe to a channel with an optional predicate filter so that I only receive messages I care about.
As an application developer, I want to initiate a request-reply conversation with a single call so that I do not need to manage inbox subjects or correlation IDs.
As an application developer, I want conversations to detect participant crashes immediately so that I can route to another participant without waiting for a timeout.

personas.name: AI Agent
personas.role: Sending and receiving messages between agents

stories.text: As an AI agent, I want to publish a message to a named channel so that other agents subscribed to that channel receive it.
As an AI agent, I want to subscribe to a channel and receive messages in my beamr mailbox so that I can process them with selective receive.
As an AI agent, I want to send a request to another agent via a conversation and receive the reply in the same call so that inter-agent communication is synchronous when needed.

personas.name: Aion Engine
personas.role: Using liminal for worker dispatch and signals

stories.text: As the Aion engine, I want to dispatch work to a worker via a conversation so that worker crash is detected immediately and the work is routed to another worker.
As the Aion engine, I want to send signals to a running workflow via a channel so that external events can influence workflow execution.
As the Aion engine, I want durable conversations so that in-flight activity dispatch survives server restart without re-executing completed steps.
As an operator, I want to list active channels and their subscriber counts so that I can monitor system utilisation.
As an operator, I want to list active conversations and their states so that I can diagnose stuck or failed exchanges.
As an operator, I want to close a channel gracefully so that all subscribers are notified before the channel shuts down.
